comment: Quality Gates catalog -- agent-ux dimension. Schema spec: quality/catalogs/README.md. Verifier impl: quality/gates/agent-ux/. Reports: quality/reports/verifications/agent-ux/. Intentionally sparse at v0.12.0; perf and security stubs land v0.12.1 per MIGRATE-03.

asserts: bash quality/gates/agent-ux/dark-factory.sh sim exits 0 against the local cargo workspace
the helper's stderr-teaching strings emit on the conflict and blob-limit paths (the v0.9.0 dark-factory invariant)
reposix init sim::demo <path> configures partial-clone correctly
no regression vs v0.9.0 baseline (POLISH-AGENT-UX broaden-and-deepen)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: scripts/dark-factory-test.sh (pre-migration) or quality/gates/agent-ux/dark-factory.sh (post-migration) finds the helper teaching strings missing -- inspect helper export-path / fetch-blob-limit code

rows._provenance_note: Hand-edit per documented gap (NOT Principle A): reposix-quality bind only supports the docs-alignment dimension at v0.13.0 P79; agent-ux dim mints stay hand-edited until GOOD-TO-HAVES-01 ships the verb extension. See .planning/phases/79-poc-reposix-attach-core/79-PLAN-OVERVIEW.md § 'New GOOD-TO-HAVES entry'.

asserts: bash quality/gates/agent-ux/reposix-attach.sh exits 0 against the local cargo workspace
post-attach git config extensions.partialClone equals 'reposix' (the new remote name; NOT origin)
post-attach remote.reposix.url begins with 'reposix::' and contains the SoT spec
the existing origin remote is unchanged (plain-git mirror semantics preserved)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: crates/reposix-cli/src/attach.rs subcommand or crates/reposix-cache/src/reconciliation.rs walk regressed; check stderr for whether extensions.partialClone or remote URL post-condition failed

rows._provenance_note: Hand-edit per documented gap (NOT Principle A): reposix-quality bind only supports the docs-alignment dimension at v0.13.0; agent-ux dim mints stay hand-edited until GOOD-TO-HAVES-01 ships the verb extension. See .planning/milestones/v0.13.0-phases/GOOD-TO-HAVES.md § GOOD-TO-HAVES-01.

asserts: bash quality/gates/agent-ux/mirror-refs-write-on-success.sh exits 0 against the local cargo workspace
after a single-backend push, the cache's bare repo has refs/mirrors/sim-head AND refs/mirrors/sim-synced-at resolvable via git for-each-ref
git log refs/mirrors/sim-synced-at -1 --format=%B first line matches `mirror synced at <RFC3339>`
audit_events_cache table contains a row with op = 'mirror_sync_written' for the push (verified by integration test)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: crates/reposix-cache/src/mirror_refs.rs writers regressed OR crates/reposix-remote/src/main.rs::handle_export success-branch wiring regressed; check stderr for whether refs were absent, tag message body malformed, or audit row missing

rows._provenance_note: Hand-edit per documented gap (NOT Principle A): reposix-quality bind only supports the docs-alignment dimension at v0.13.0; agent-ux dim mints stay hand-edited until GOOD-TO-HAVES-01 ships the verb extension. See .planning/milestones/v0.13.0-phases/GOOD-TO-HAVES.md § GOOD-TO-HAVES-01.

asserts: bash quality/gates/agent-ux/mirror-refs-readable-by-vanilla-fetch.sh exits 0 against the local cargo workspace
after a successful single-backend push, a fresh `git clone --bare` of the cache's bare repo brings BOTH refs/mirrors/sim-head and refs/mirrors/sim-synced-at into the new clone
vanilla-git readers can observe mirror lag without any reposix awareness (proves stateless-connect advertises mirror refs)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: crates/reposix-remote/src/stateless_connect.rs advertisement regressed OR transfer.hideRefs setup at crates/reposix-cache/src/cache.rs began hiding refs/mirrors/* — check whether vanilla-clone's for-each-ref returns the refs

rows._provenance_note: Hand-edit per documented gap (NOT Principle A): reposix-quality bind only supports the docs-alignment dimension at v0.13.0; agent-ux dim mints stay hand-edited until GOOD-TO-HAVES-01 ships the verb extension. See .planning/milestones/v0.13.0-phases/GOOD-TO-HAVES.md § GOOD-TO-HAVES-01.

asserts: bash quality/gates/agent-ux/mirror-refs-cited-in-reject-hint.sh exits 0 against the local cargo workspace
after a successful push (refs populated) followed by a stale-prior push, the conflict-reject stderr cites refs/mirrors/sim-synced-at
reject stderr contains a parseable RFC3339 timestamp + `(N minutes ago)` rendering
first-push None case (no refs yet) omits the synced-at hint cleanly per RESEARCH.md pitfall 7 (covered by reject_hint_first_push_omits_synced_at_line integration test)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: crates/reposix-remote/src/main.rs::handle_export conflict-reject hint composition regressed OR crates/reposix-cache/src/mirror_refs.rs::read_mirror_synced_at parser regressed; check whether stderr cites the ref name, RFC3339, and 'N minutes ago' tokens
